Weapon

Range1400
Reload600ms

Media

Fire soundshot2.mp3

How To Read This Weapon

Damage type50% Kinetic + 50% Energy
Per hit3200
Shot total19200per hit x hit count
Approx. DPS32150shot total + DoT / reload
Heat per sec183
Hits per shot6
TagsDoT, Multi-hit, projectile
  • Bounces to multiple targets
  • Starts at 3x targets.
  • Reduces damage dealt for x seconds.

Combat Stats

DoT90
DoT duration15
Range1400
Radius0
Reload600ms
Heat cost110
Typeprojectile

Where To Get It

SourceTypeContextChance / AvailabilityQty / Price

Tech Levels

LevelDescriptionProjectilePrimary MaterialSecondary Material
1Increase damage by 10%. Increase number of times the spheres can bounce by one. Concussion SphereSteel x400n/a
2Increase range by 35%.Concussion SphereSteel x800n/a
3Increase damage by 40%. Increase number of times the spheres can bounce by two. Increase damage reduction by 5%. Increase duration by 2 seconds. Concussion SphereSteel x1600n/a
4Increase damage by 44%. Increase range by 35%.Concussion SphereSteel x3200Hydrogen Crystal x800
5Increase projectile speed by 20%. Increase damage by 24%. Reduce power cost by 10%. Concussion SphereSteel x6400Plasma Fluids x200
6Increase damage by 67%. Reduce power cost by 10%. Increase number of times the spheres can bounce by two. Increase damage reduction by 5%. Increase duration by 2 seconds. Concussion SphereSteel x12800Iridium x800
